About Us

We Forge Digital Experiences That Last

PixelForge is a passionate team of designers, developers and digital strategists committed to building world-class websites for businesses of all sizes.

From stunning landing pages to complex web applications, we combine creativity with technology to deliver results that exceed expectations.

Questions

Frequently Asked Questions

Most websites are completed within 1–3 weeks depending on complexity. Landing pages can be done in as little as 3–5 business days. We always give you a clear timeline before we start.

Yes! We offer flexible monthly maintenance packages to keep your website updated, secure and performing at its best after launch.

Our SEO service includes keyword research, on-page optimisation, technical SEO audit, meta tag setup, speed improvements, and monthly reporting to track your rankings and growth.

Absolutely! We specialise in website redesigns — transforming outdated sites into modern, high-converting digital experiences while preserving your existing content and SEO value.

Pricing depends on the scope of the project. Landing pages start at an affordable rate, while full websites vary based on features and complexity. Contact us for a free personalised quote.

Yes! We are experienced Webflow and Framer developers. These platforms allow us to build fast, beautiful, and easily editable websites without heavy backend code.
